name: tab-triage-dashboard
description: Full-page tab manager for Firefox with sorting, filtering, grouping, and search.

scripts.zip: zip -r -FS tab-triage-dashboard.zip manifest.json background.js triage.html triage.js triage.css icons/ -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.lint: zip -r -FS /tmp/tab-triage-dashboard-lint.zip manifest.json background.js triage.html triage.js triage.css icons/ -x '*.DS_Store' && addons-linter /tmp/tab-triage-dashboard-lint.zip --boring --warnings-as-errors; EXIT=$?; rm -f /tmp/tab-triage-dashboard-lint.zip; exit $EXIT
